titleStmt.title: SII 24.71: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 71. (A.R. No. 132 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Partly built in States that as the original tenants of the dēvadāna village (name lost) in Mīpilāṟu in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu were unable to pay the taxes, this village was renamed Rājanārāyaṇanallūr and redistributed among new tenants. Dated in the 24th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻn=ta
puviyil ponnemiyaḷavu n=tannemi naṭa
ppa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuva
ttuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻi
lāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai
yīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir muṉaik
kon=taḷa varaicar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷurai kaḻi
ttut toḻvali kāṭṭip poṟpari naṭāt
tik kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cū
ṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ
potumaiyum ponniyāṭai naṉni
lappāvaiyum tanimaiyun=tavirap punitaṟ
tirumaṇi makuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭit tanna
ṭiyiraṇṭu n=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnila ve
n=tar cūṭa munṉai manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu
vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticaitoṟuñ
cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila viḷākam E
ṅkaṇu n=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa
Oru tani meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ
tivān=tarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta katañ
corikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennava
n karun=talai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponna
karp puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa pannāḷRead munnāḷ •piṟaku
lap piṟai pola niṟ piḻai yennuñ
colletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai vil
letir koṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅ
kili tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvenat tu
ṅka pattirai yaḷavu veṅkaṉum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tan mānamum kūṟina viramum kiṭappa Eṟina ma
laikaḷum mutuku neḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭain toṭa viḻun=ta kaṭalkaḷum talaivirittalamara kuṭaticai
t tannāṭukantu tānun=tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭap palapala mutukum payantetirmāṟina jeyap peru n=tiruvum paḻiyukan
tu kuṭutta pukaḻital celviyum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭantayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamum
ciṅkaṇa mennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅkoḷ
ḷat tiruvuḷat (taruḷiḷat) taṭaittu veḷḷavaruparittaraṅkamum poruparittalaṅ kaḷum tan=tiravāriyum U
ṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal pāyvatu polat tan peruñ ceṉaiyai ye vip pañcavaraiva (va)rum po
ruta(ta) Am(ā)rkkaḷattañci veru neḷin toṭi Araṇenap pukka kāṭaṟat tuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tam
mai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟa veñcuṟa meṟṟik koṟṟa vijeyastampa n=ticai toṟum niṟutti muttin calāpa
mum muttamiṭ potiyalum matta veṅkaripaṭu maiyyac cayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaik koṇṭaruḷit tennāṭ
ṭellai kāṭṭiya cāveṟellān tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutanittalaivaraik kuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭ
ṭāṟuṭpaṭa nenitoṟu nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiral koḷ virasiṅhāsanan=tiriya viṭṭaruḷi poṅkoḷyāramum tiru
ppuyattalaṅkaḷum pola viramun=tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalar vaṇaṅka virasiṅhāsanattu viṟ
ṟirun=taruḷiya [ kovirājakecaripanma] rāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolottuṅka coḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 4Āvatu
Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkam tiruppati tevatāṉam kolottuṅka coḻa vaḷanāṭṭup pāccil kūṟṟattu mipilāṟṟu
kā ṇiyāḷarum varicaiyāru niccayittapaṭikku nilaininṟu Iṟai yirukkamā
ṭṭāmaiyil tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi rājanārāyaṇanallūr Ennum tirunāmattāl variyiliṭṭu Ivvūr
vaḷaiyiṟ cuṟṟu muṟṟum Uṭumpoṭi Āmai taviḻn=ta nilamellām nilaṅkalan=ta vaṇṇam nāṟpatu kūṟāka
kiḷinallūr kiḻavan rāja rājan tappā nitikkuk kūṟonṟum tuḷa ruṭaiyān veḷān veṇkā
ṭanāna coḻavallapac cenāvaraiyanukkuk kūṟonṟum tuḷārunuṭaiyān veḷān rājamāṇik
kattukkuk kūṟoṉṟu kāṭampāṭi yuṭaiyān paṭṭālakan kāvuṭaiyānukkuk kūṟonṟum paṭṭā
lakakkuṭitāṅkikkum paṭṭālakan paṭṭālakan tiruvaraṅkatevanukkum paṭṭālaka
n vaṭukanātanukkuk kūṟonṟum tevan tiruppāṇṭikkuk kūṟu 1(1/2)yum cuṟṟi kecuvanukkuk kū
ṟu (1/2)yum kiḷinallūr kiḻavan rājarājan Akkāḷikkuk kūṟonṟum karumpanuruṭaiyān karuṇākaran te
van kūṟaraiyum vaḷaiyamaṅkalamuṭaiyān tiruttayam Āticcanum tiruttayam Uṭai yānumāka
kkūṟu Araiyum maṅkalamuṭaiyān veḷān periyān kūṟu Onṟum maṇavikuṭaiyān nārāyaṇa
t tillaik kūttan kūṟu Onṟum Erippākka muṭaiyān tiruvaraṅka tevan Aṇai nta koḷari kūṟu Onṟum
koṭiyāla muṭaiyān cuṟṟi tiruvaraṅkatevan kūṟu Onṟum mulaṅkuṭaiyān ṉātan U
ṟu Enṟum tūruṭaiyān Irācan Arumoḻi kūṟu Onṟum karumpanūruṭaiyān
ṅkaḻanikkuk kūṟu Araiyum kaṅkaikkuṭaiyān tillai vāṇan tiruvaraṅka śrī
kkuk kūṟu Onṟum
n pāṭiyuṭaiyān
araṅkan karuvuṭaiyāṉu
kkum Araṅkan kuṭitāṅ
kikkum kūṟonṟum kāṭa
n po ṭaiyān Araṅ
kan veṇkāṭanukkuk kū
ṟonṟum Ālaṅkuṭai
yān ve kūtta
ṉukkuk kūṟonṟum Ā
laṅkuṭaiyān kūttan
veṇṇāvaṉukkuk kūṟo
nṟum kāṭanpāṭi Aṭai
muṭaiyān cūṟṟi
kkuk kūṟonṟum kāṭan pāṭi
vuṭaiyān kāvuṭaiyān U
kikkum kāvuṭaiyā
n Araṅkanukkuk kūṟonṟum
ciṟṟāṟṟūr kiḻavan tiruvo
van tiruvākkulamu
ṭaiyānukkuk kūṟon
ṟum ṟūr kiḻavan tiru
veṅkaṭavan comanuk
ku kūṟonṟum Āvalu
r kiḻavan
ṉūkku kūṟonṟum
kuṭaiyān Arai
maṅkala
raiyum
ṭaiyān
nikkina civappi
kūṟonṟumSome lines after this are built in.

panukku kūṟu Onṟum
puliyūr kiḻavan
tiruc ciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉukku kūṟu Araiyu
m kāṭampāṭi Uṭaiyā
n tiruvaraṅkan paṭṭāla
kanukku kūṟu Araiyum
malaṟuk kūttan
kūṟu Araiyum malla
kamaṇikkac coti
kku kūṟu Araiyum kiḻaṇi
ntūruṭaiyān ponnan
vināyakanukku kūṟu Arai
yum Uḻavūruṭaiyān Araṅ
kan tevanukku kūṟu Araiyu
m kallūruṭaiyān Araṅka
n Araiyanukkuñ ciṟuuya
lūruṭaiyān veḷḷima
laikkiniya ninṟānukku kūṟu
araiyum karumpanūruṭai
yān Uṭaiyān tirucciṟṟa
mpala muṭaiyānukkum kā
ṭanpa Uṭaiyān paṭ
ṭālakan Uṭaiyānukku
kūṟu Araiyum ka
ruṭaiyān vempan va
ṭukanukku kūṟu Araiyu
m cemaṅkala muṭai
yān Araiyan
yam pukka
nu Araiyum
ṭaiyān
tirucciṟṟampala muṭai
yānukku

yān toṇṭan tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyānukku kūṟaraiyum
kiḷinalūr kiḻavan Araṅkan Aruḷ ceyvānukku kūṟu Onṟum
kuḻalūr kiḻavan muḷaittān kaṇ yanukku kūraiyum kaḷattūru
ṭaiyān cuṟṟa Ārāvamutukku kūṟaraiyum paḻaiyāṟu kiḻaiya
nāna vikkapincannukku kūṟu Araiyum Ākak kūṟu nāṟpatu Ivarkaḷukkum Ivarkaḷ vaṟkattā
ṟkum Ivarkaḷ Iṭai koṇṭāṟkum koṇṭāriṭai koṇṭāṟkum can=tirātittavaṟ kāṇi
yāy taran veṇṭu payir ceytu mu Ivvūr niccayitta nellu nālāyirat taiññūṟ
varicaippaṭi Antarāya mu toṟum kuṟṟiṟaiyāy Iṟuppatākavum Ivarkaḷilbuilt in
⎯⎯kkup puṇaiyāṟ yiṟai yiṟuppatākavum kuṭiponavan kāṇi Ūr
⎯⎯mel Ōrāṇṭu payirceytu Iṟaiyili Itiṉ Etirā māṇṭu kāṇiyāḷanContinuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.71 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
